Dear Hiring Team,

I am applying for the Backend Developer position at Webot Singapore. I am interested in your focus on real-time risk control engines and data processing since I spend a lot of time building data-driven systems.

I built ValoFenua, a real estate platform for French Polynesia that runs a daily scraper collecting 1,300+ listings. This data feeds into an AI agent that estimates prices from live market trends. I also created an automated job search pipeline using n8n and AI agents to handle real-time data flow. These projects taught me how to handle large data sets and build reliable backends.

I also redesigned the installation process at my current company, EXAIL Robotics. It used to take about 2 days for the technical team to set up. Now it takes 2 hours and anyone on the team can run it. That's an 85% reduction in deployment time through smart automation.

I am finishing my M.S. in Information Systems Engineering and have been working with Python and SQL for several years. I would enjoy applying this experience to help stabilize and optimize Webot's risk monitoring systems.
